---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

How should it work?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about?

## Security implications

Does this feature:
- Add any new network destination? (must be `*.feishu.cn`)
- Request any new OAuth scope? (must be `readonly`)
- Change the default state from OFF to ON?
- Affect token expiry handling?

If yes to any, explain how the security model is preserved.
